sections.title: ## Introduction
sections.content: By accessing or using **{{appName}}**, you agree to these Terms of Service.

sections.title: ## User Accounts
sections.content: Users need to create an account to access the platform. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

sections.title: ## User Content
sections.content: Users may post content such as text or images. By posting content, you grant us permission to display and distribute that content on the platform.

sections.title: ## Prohibited Activities
sections.content:
- Post illegal or harmful content
- Harass or abuse other users
- Upload viruses or malicious code
- Attempt to hack or disrupt the service

sections.title: ## Content Removal
sections.content: We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms or community guidelines.

sections.title: ## Account Termination
sections.content: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

sections.title: ## Disclaimer of Liability
sections.content: The platform is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not responsible for user-generated content.

sections.title: ## Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms from time to time. By continuing to use the service, you agree to the revised terms.

sections.title: ## Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of **{{country}}**.

sections.title: ## Contact Information
sections.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at **{{email}}**.

sections.title: ## Introduction
sections.content:
Welcome to **{{appName}}**.
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our social media platform.

sections.title: ## Information We Collect
sections.content:
- Personal information (first name, last name, email)
- Profile information (profile picture)
- Content you post (photos) and messages you sent
- Usage data (pages visited, interactions)

sections.title: ## How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
- Provide and maintain the platform
- Allow users to create profiles and share content
- Improve the website and user experience
- Communicate updates or important notifications
- Prevent fraud and maintain security

sections.title: ## Sharing of Information
sections.content:
We do **not sell** your personal data. We may share information with:

- Service providers that help operate the platform
- Authorities if required by law

sections.title: ## Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: We may use cookies or similar technologies to improve functionality, remember preferences, and analyze usage.

sections.title: ## Data Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, but no online system is completely secure.

sections.title: ## Your Rights
sections.content:
- Access your personal data
- Update your account information

sections.title: ## Children’s Privacy
sections.content: Our platform is not intended for users under the age of 13 (or the minimum legal age in your region).

sections.title: ## Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page.

sections.title: ## Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at **{{email}}**.

error-page.title: ERROR
error-page.defaultErrorMessage: An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again later.
